title: hypericum × dummeri
intro: Hypericum × dummeri, also known as Dummer's St. John's Wort, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Hypericum, which is a type of flowering plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, due to its high concentration of hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of Hypericum × dummeri include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Hypericum × dummeri is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support mental and physical well-being.
